key_factors.text_cn: 英格兰预计踢4-2-3-1，Rice、Anderson控球，Bellingham多在10号位活动。
key_factors.text_en: England are expected to play a 4-2-3-1, with Rice and Anderson controlling possession and Bellingham operating mostly at the No. 10.
source_names: World Cup Group L tactical guide: Croatia's veterans ...

key_factors.text_cn: 克罗地亚被描述为紧凑中位防守，锋线重点阻止英格兰从中路推进。
key_factors.text_en: Croatia are described as a compact mid-block, with their forwards focused on stopping England from progressing through the middle.

key_factors.text_cn: 战术预览称英格兰需先移动克罗地亚防线，再打低平传中、倒三角和后排插上。
key_factors.text_en: Tactical previews say England must first move Croatia's defense, then use low crosses, cutbacks and late runs from deep.

key_factors.text_cn: BBC称Saka已恢复完整训练，Guardian也称他表示对阵克罗地亚已准备好。
key_factors.text_en: The BBC says Saka is back in full training, and the Guardian reports he says he's ready to face Croatia.
WhoScored projects a Croatia lineup featuring Modric, Kovacic, Perisic and Vuskovic, among others.
source_names: England-Croatia - FIFA World Cup 2026 Statistical Preview

key_factors.text_cn: 比赛在达拉斯当地15点开球，北德州预报94°F、体感最高105°F。
key_factors.text_en: Kickoff is 3 p.m. local in Dallas, with North Texas forecast at 94°F and a heat index up to 105°F.
source_names: FIFA World Cup 2026™ Dallas on Instagram
